name: Ladki Bahin Support Grant
description: Prototype record for direct financial assistance to eligible women through a state social support program.
eligibility: Women aged 21 to 60 with annual family income below Rs 2 lakh.
official_source_name: Maharashtra Women and Child Development Department
verification_notes: Prototype source mapping. Re-check the current scheme rules before public launch.
required_documents:
Aadhaar card
Income certificate
Bank passbook
where_to_apply: Apply through the official state portal or district women welfare office.
offline_location: District Women and Child Development Office

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Prototype education and awareness record for girl child welfare and improved access to education services.
eligibility: Families seeking support for education and welfare of girl children.
official_source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development
verification_notes: Prototype national listing. Verify the latest district-level implementation flow.
required_documents:
Child birth certificate
School record
Parent identity proof
where_to_apply: Check district implementation details through the official ministry portal and local anganwadi network.
offline_location: District Women and Child Development Office

name: Mahila Samriddhi Microcredit
description: Prototype low-interest credit support record for women-led livelihood and micro-enterprise activity.
eligibility: Adult women interested in self-employment, micro-enterprise, or livelihood expansion.
official_source_name: National Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation
verification_notes: Marked stale so the ops dashboard can surface freshness reminders.
required_documents:
Identity proof
Address proof
Income proof
Business idea note
where_to_apply: Start from the official corporation portal and confirm the nodal agency in your state.
offline_location: District Industries Centre or state finance corporation office

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Prototype maternity support record focused on pregnancy-related assistance and nutrition-linked benefits.
eligibility: Pregnant women and mothers who meet the conditions of the maternity benefit program.
official_source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development
verification_notes: Field process may vary by district; confirm through the health worker network.
required_documents:
Mother and child protection card
Identity proof
Bank account details
where_to_apply: Work with the local health worker or anganwadi center and confirm portal submission steps on the official site.
offline_location: Primary Health Centre or anganwadi center

name: Stand-Up India for Women Entrepreneurs
description: Prototype record for women entrepreneurs seeking startup or enterprise loan support and handholding.
eligibility: Women planning a greenfield enterprise and seeking institutional credit support.
verification_notes: Portal mapping and source metadata updated for the upgraded prototype.
required_documents:
Identity proof
Address proof
Business proposal
Bank details
where_to_apply: Begin through the official portal and connect with the lead bank branch assigned to your proposal.
offline_location: Lead bank branch or District Industries Centre

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra Outreach
description: Prototype empowerment record for community support, access to welfare information, and referral help.
eligibility: Women seeking community-level support, information, or access to multiple welfare services.
official_source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development
verification_notes: This sample record intentionally flags a broken or missing source for ops alert testing.
where_to_apply: Use the district women welfare office to confirm the active local support point.
offline_location: District Women and Child Development Office

name: National Creche Support for Working Mothers
description: Prototype care-support record for working mothers who need childcare access while maintaining employment.
eligibility: Working mothers or caregivers needing childcare support through approved centers.
official_source_name: Women and Child Development linked childcare support
verification_notes: Confirm whether district centers are active before rollout.
required_documents:
Identity proof
Work proof
Child age proof
where_to_apply: Contact the district child development office to confirm a supported center near you.

name: State Rural Women Skill Hub
description: Prototype state-linked skill development record for women needing training, placement support, or livelihood transition.
eligibility: Women interested in job skills, livelihood training, or placement support.
verification_notes: Treat as prototype routing until state mission details are fully mapped.
required_documents:
Identity proof
Education proof if available
Bank details
where_to_apply: Start on the national skill platform and confirm the nearest state or district training partner.
